case_title: DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK VS. ROSE B AUTSTRIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTSTRIA, ROSE B $2,455.57 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.57, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
